en: Choose which game to manage or play.
Click to load a summary of latest changes from GitHub.
Use the latest rolling experimental build\n(from cataclysmbn/Cataclysm-BN). Only visible for BN experimental.
Choose which release of the game to install or update to.
Re-retrieve the list of available game releases\nfrom GitHub (only for experimental releases).
Install selected game release (Different forks\n are managed separately and can co-exist).

If checked, the game install currently set as active
will be replaced with the version selected above.
Otherwise, the selected build will be a new,
separate install of the game.
Open game installation directory (contains\ngame executable and built-in game content).
Open user data directory (contains saves, \ngame configuration, user mods, sound, etc.)
Skip main menu and quick-load last played world.\n(First character will always be loaded if there are multiple.)
Open the wiki for this game fork (currently available for TLG).
Search the TLG wiki for the entered term (only available for TLG).

Set the selected game install as active (i.e. in use).
"Active" install is the one that will be launched
when you click Play/Resume, or updated when
you click Install.
Delete the selected copy of the game.\n(Saves, settings and other user data\nare stored separately and will not be lost.)
Warning: this game build requires GLIBC %s, which is newer than what your system provides. The game may fail to start.
To fix this, upgrade your Linux distribution or use a newer Ubuntu/Debian base. Experimental builds track the latest GLIBC.
Game crashed with a known display settings issue. Your userdata may contain an 'opengles' renderer setting that is incompatible with this version of CDDA.

The game crashed due to an incompatible display settings file (config/options.json).

This is caused by an old 'opengles' renderer setting that is no longer supported in recent CDDA builds (after 2026-04-10).

Would you like to delete config/options.json to reset your display settings?
Your saves and other data will not be affected.
Display settings reset. Relaunch the game to apply fresh defaults.
Failed to delete config/options.json. Please delete it manually from your userdata/config folder.
